initialChecks.firstLayerActiveBefore: globe-layer-button flex items-center gap-2 rounded-paw-sm border px-3 py-2 text-xs font-bold transition-all is-active-mission bg-paw-accent/90 text-white border-paw-accent

interaction.afterClass: globe-layer-button flex items-center gap-2 rounded-paw-sm border px-3 py-2 text-xs font-bold transition-all bg-paw-panel/80 text-paw-muted border-paw-border

notes: Browser screenshot capture timed out on the live WebGL page, so visual screenshot evidence is supplied by round15_cdp_verify.js outputs.
The in-app Browser smoke was used for page identity, DOM health, console health, and interaction proof.
